name: GeoNames allCountries
note: zip of allCountries.txt — the full GeoNames gazetteer (~12M rows, same columns as cities15000: col 1 = geonameid, col 2 = name, col 15 = population). ~400 MB zipped. The corpus-scale fuzzy run. Pinned to a frozen snapshot; GeoNames regenerates ~daily, so on an upstream refresh strict verification fails until this sha256 is re-pinned (see geonames-cities15000.json).
